title: Ononis glabrescens

The genus Ononis is a group of plants commonly known as the spiny restharrow or restharrow. intro: Ononis glabrescens, commonly known as the 'Kidney Spur Valentine', is a perennial leguminous plant species native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and inflammation, due to its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Ononis glabrescens include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Ononis glabrescens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of kidney stones and urinary tract issues.
